meta.title: Erick Allan — Software Engineer · AI Engineer
meta.description: Software engineer building scalable backend and AI systems with Python and AWS.

home.intro: Whether it's a landing page that converts or a complete platform that runs your operation, I take your idea from the first conversation to a finished product that's live and working — always focused on what truly matters to you: more revenue, less wasted time, and something you can rely on.
home.tagline: I build software that solves real problems and delivers measurable results for your business.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer passionate about designing scalable, maintainable, and high-performance systems. I've worked with Python, JavaScript, relational and non-relational databases, Redis, Docker, Terraform, and AWS — building cloud-native architectures that are resilient, efficient, and secure. I also bring AI tools into my workflow to improve development speed, code quality, and problem-solving.

I've contributed to solutions across different domains — clinical management platforms, internal management systems, banking integrations, and chatbots — always with a focus on reliability, clean architecture, and long-term maintainability.
I'm deeply interested in software architecture and system design, and I'm driven by the challenge of turning complex business problems into elegant, efficient solutions.

points: Develop backend services and AI-powered features for a corporate Generative AI platform using Python and AWS.
Build integrations with external AI providers and services, including image-generation workflows through OpenRouter.
Develop integrations with enterprise platforms such as Google Drive and Microsoft services.
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to deliver scalable, production-ready AI solutions.
Developed backend solutions with a strong focus on clean architecture, DDD, best coding practices, and delivering real value to clients.
Built frontend features for both web and mobile platforms, aiming to solve client problems effectively.
Worked on features integrating AI tools, following test-driven development (TDD).
Built and maintained robust cloud infrastructure with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) on AWS — architecture, scalability, and security best practices.
Led a development team, managing sprints, client meetings, and stakeholder communication to ensure smooth delivery.
Built an interactive dashboard to help internal teams automate management and finance tasks previously done manually.
Designed and implemented a Telegram chatbot with Node.js and PostgreSQL to support SENAC RN courses, helping students reinforce what they learned.
Managed the chatbot's full deployment — initially on Microsoft Azure, later migrated to on-premises servers.
Developed custom web applications and small-business solutions for clients with Node.js, JavaScript, React, and SQL databases.
Designed and implemented REST APIs, backend services, and database architectures tailored to each project.
Built responsive, interactive UIs with React and vanilla JavaScript.
Modeled and managed data with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.
Integrated third-party services and external APIs to support business workflows.
Maintained and improved existing applications, focusing on performance, scalability, and code quality.
Worked directly with clients to gather requirements and deliver projects from concept to deployment.

blog.subtitle: Notes on building software.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: The fastest way to reach me is WhatsApp — email and phone work too.
